channel.title: Frontity + Tailwind
channel.description:
Hi,
thanks for the awesome Frontity documentation. I had no prior experience of React but I was able put up a working site in a couple of hours. However I have been using Tailwind lately a lot, so I was trying to make Frontity and TW work together but had no luck. As more and more people are using TW nowadays, would it make sense to add a detailed guide to implementing Tailwind into Frontity?

item.title: Frontity + Tailwind
item.dc:creator: cabbage
item.description:
Hi,

thanks for the awesome Frontity documentation. I had no prior experience of React but I was able put up a working site in a couple of hours. However I have been using Tailwind lately a lot, so I was trying to make Frontity and TW work together but had no luck. As more and more people are using TW nowadays, would it make sense to add a detailed guide to implementing Tailwind into Frontity?

Read full topic
